stemHtml:
An aircraft is expected to clear a terrain by 2000 ft. The elevation of the mountain is 14200 ft and the local QNH at an airport of elevation 6500 ft is 1013 hPa, OAT -23ºC. Calculate the indicated altitude to be shown in the altimeter in order to clear the mountain range by specified clearance.

Use 1 hPa = 27 ft
